flags.message: Florida hurricane/windstorm exposure requires underwriter referral.
flags.evidence: [underwriting_guidelines.md] Florida hurricane or windstorm exposure requires underwriter referral when the cedent has material coastal concentration, significant homeowners exposure, or incomplete ZIP-level exposure data.

underwriter_summary: Gulf Mutual Insurance Company submission scored 62.1/100 (Medium). The slip covers Hurricane, Windstorm, Storm Surge in Florida, Gulf Coast, Southeast U.S with a limit of $50,000,000 attaching at $25,000,000. Key triage notes: Florida hurricane/windstorm exposure requires underwriter referral.
